description: Every prompt Jasper might receive in the wild, grouped by feature area. Used by scripts/verify-prompt-matrix.ts to prove planning-level coverage across the full feature surface, not just cherry-picked examples.

prompts.prompt: Create a 60-second video explaining how SalesVelocity.ai helps small businesses automate their sales outreach.
Make me a quick promo video for our Black Friday sale.
I need a 30 second Instagram Reels video about AI-powered lead scoring.
Generate a product explainer video — 90 seconds, our CEO talking about automated outreach.
Create a blog post AND 5 social media posts about the benefits of AI-powered lead scoring for B2B sales teams.
Write a blog and an email newsletter for our new pricing tier.
prompts.comment: Content Manager's Copywriter specialist handles both blog long-form and email marketing copy, so a single delegate_to_content covers the email newsletter too. The separate outreach path (send_email/delegate_to_outreach) is for transactional and sequence sends, not marketing newsletters.

prompts.prompt: Blog post plus 3 LinkedIn posts about our latest feature launch.
I want a blog post, a video, and 5 social posts about customer success stories.
Help me with marketing.
What should I focus on this quarter to grow revenue?
I'm not sure what to do next. Any ideas?
How would you approach lead generation for a SaaS product?
Should we focus on email or social this quarter?
What leads do we have?
How many published blog posts are on the site right now?
Show me our most recent social posts across all platforms.
What's our current SEO configuration?
Hi
Who are you?
Thanks!

Launch a full campaign for our AI-powered lead scoring product targeting B2B sales teams: research the market, write a blog post, draft 5 social posts, create a 60-second video, and prepare a 3-email outreach drip.
prompts.comment: orchestrate_campaign is a single tool that internally produces blog + video storyboard + social posts + email sequence + landing page — including it in the plan satisfies the blog/social/video/email groups even without listing each sub-tool. The outreach drip is separate from marketing-email per orchestrate_campaign's docs so it still needs draft_outreach_email / delegate_to_outreach / send_email.

prompts.prompt: Do everything for a product launch this Friday — research, content, ads, email outreach.
Run a full marketing blitz for Black Friday across every channel.
Call this lead at +15551234567 and qualify them.
Set Jasper up in prospector mode to handle inbound calls about our starter plan.
Dial +15551234567 and give them the pitch for our enterprise tier.
Create a product listing for our Enterprise tier at $499/month with unlimited seats and premium support.
Add a new Starter Plan product at $49/month targeting small businesses.
Update our Pro tier pricing from $199 to $249 effective next Monday.
Build me a landing page for the Black Friday sale.
Create a new pricing page that lists our three tiers and a comparison table.
Migrate our website to match the competitor at example.com.
Update the SEO configuration for our spring campaign — new keywords, meta title, and description.
prompts.comment: Valid paths: (a) direct update_seo_config, (b) delegate to content/marketing for a broader SEO refresh that includes new copy. Either is acceptable.

prompts.prompt: Research trending topics for our blog this quarter.
What keywords should we target this quarter?
Draft a response to this 1-star Google review: 'Terrible onboarding, nothing worked.'
Check our ratings across all review platforms.
Respond to every unread review from the last 30 days.
Set up a workflow: when a new lead is created, send them the welcome email, wait 3 days, then send the case-study email.
Build me a nurture sequence for SaaS trial users — 5 emails over 14 days.
Create a contact form for the homepage with name, email, company, and message fields.
Add a newsletter signup form to the blog page.
Send an SMS to +15551234567 reminding them about their appointment tomorrow at 2pm.
Text our top 10 leads a link to the new case study.
Help
Yes, go ahead.
prompts.comment: Without prior conversation context, 'Yes go ahead' is genuinely ambiguous — the expander can reasonably classify it as conversational, advisory, action, or strategic. All are acceptable as long as it produces SOME response.

prompts.prompt: Research our top competitor AND write a blog post about their weaknesses.
Can you check our system state?
i need some stuf for my biz can u help
